title: Fallen Sword
short_description: Retro fantasy RPG/MMO legacy — explore Erildath’s realms with fifteen years of history; play in browser or on mobile from anywhere.
description: Dive into fifteen years of history and join thousands of adventurers in the retro RPG world of Erildath. Whether you’re a veteran fan, a returning adventurer, or a new player with a taste for old-school fantasy, the vast realms of Fallen Sword are now available at your fingertips!
